Math — Intermediate Curriculum

25 lessons covering fractions, ratios, algebra basics, and geometry foundations.

  1. Fraction concepts and equivalence
  2. Adding & subtracting fractions
  3. Multiplying & dividing fractions
  4. Decimals operations
  5. Percentages and real-world percent problems
  6. Ratios and proportions
  7. Integer arithmetic
  8. Intro to algebraic expressions
  9. Solving one-step equations
  10. Solving two-step equations
  11. Inequalities basics
  12. Linear functions and graphs
  13. Coordinate plane and plotting
  14. Geometry: area and perimeter
  15. Geometry: volume basics
  16. Exponents and powers
  17. Roots and radicals intro
  18. Polynomials introduction
  19. Factoring simple expressions
  20. Systems of linear equations (intro)
  21. Basic probability and counting
  22. Mean, median, mode, range
  23. Slope and rate of change
  24. Function notation basics
  25. Review & applied problem set
